chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 775 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.6494/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.6495/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.6496/2025 (R/Surety) 13.11.2025 Mr. Farhan Ali Shaikh, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application is filed by the applicant Fayaz Ahmed Gopang seeking return of surety documents. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it seems that accused Shahnawaz and Ghulam Murtaza, who on 28.08.2025, were granted protective bail for a period of seven days, subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- each, for which applicant stood surety by depositing two original special savings certificates of such amount, have been acquitted, as is evident from order dated 06.10.2025, annexed with this application. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, learned Additional Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety documents to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
